---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🎯 Is your feature request related to a problem?
Describe the problem. E.g., "I'm frustrated when..."

## 💡 Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🤔 Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Case
Why is this feature important? Who would benefit?
- Example: "Users managing 10k+ documents need better search performance"
- Example: "Teams need to share conversations across workspace"

## 🎨 Proposed Implementation
How would you implement this? (optional)
- Example: "Add a caching layer with Redis"
- Example: "Expose batch API endpoints"

## 📈 Impact
- Estimated complexity: Low / Medium / High
- Estimated effort: 1-2 days / 1 week / 2+ weeks
- How many users would benefit: Few / Some / Many

## 🔗 Related Issues
- Related to #123
- Blocks #456

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots here.
